message:
🌱 ci: increase Playwright job timeout from 20m to 30m

Merged by reviewer pass

files.patch:
@@ -340,7 +340,7 @@ jobs:
     if: github.event_name == 'pull_request'
     needs: build
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
-    timeout-minutes: 20
+    timeout-minutes: 30
     defaults:
       run:
         working-directory: web
